headline: Cboe and CNBC Launch Multi-Year Collaboration to Deliver Daily Live Market Coverage from Chicago Trading Floor
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, and CNBC, the recognized world leader in business news, today announced a multi-year collaboration that will bring daily CNBC programming to Cboe's historic Chicago trading floor.

headline: BTQ Technologies Appoints Dr. Ro Cammarota to Accelerate QCIM Product Development, Commercialization, and Global Partnerships
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, is pleased to announce that Dr. Ro Cammarota is joining the Company's U.S. team to support the development, commercialization, and strategic partnership efforts for BTQ's post-quantum semiconductor product, QCIM.

headline: Near‑24x5 Trading And Event Markets Expansion Might Change The Case For Investing In Cboe (CBOE)
summary: In March 2026, Cboe Global Markets announced a new prediction markets framework and filed with the SEC to introduce near-24x5 U.S. equity trading on its EDGX Exchange, alongside plans to launch a Mini S&P 500 contract. This pairing of extended-hours cash-equity trading with an expanded toolkit for event-linked contracts highlights Cboe’s push to broaden how and when investors trade. Next, we’ll explore how near-24x5 U.S. equity trading on EDGX could influence Cboe’s investment narrative...
